circuits.designation: Ground-floor ring final circuit (kitchen, utility, dining, lounge + outdoor spur)

sockets.spur_purpose: garden socket from FCU on ring

non_compliance_flags.message: Bathroom zones 1 and 2 contain no socket outlets in this design; only zone 3 shaver supply (BS EN 61558-2-5) provided. Documented for clarity per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Part 7-701.
Outdoor socket fed via 13A fused spur from ring final circuit per BS 7671 §522.6.201 and IET OSG Appendix B; IP65 enclosure on external wall.
All Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3; ring continuity (r1/rn/r2) and Zs ≤ 1.37Ω (32A type B, 0.4s) to be confirmed at install per §411.4.5.

assumptions: Ze=0.35Ω declared by DNO at consumer cut-out; not yet measured on site.
PSCC=6kA declared at origin; CU busbar and all RCBOs rated 6kA Icu (IEC 60898-1).
Ground-floor ring (kitchen+utility+dining+lounge) covers ~52 m² floor area, within the IET OSG §8.4.4 100 m² recommended limit for a 32A ring.
First-floor ring (3 bedrooms) covers ~36 m², within IET OSG §8.4.4 limit.
Diversity factors per IET OSG Appendix A: cooker 10A + 30% remainder + 5A for socket on CCU; rings assumed simultaneous load ≤ 16A per ring under domestic usage profile.
Cable routes assumed Reference Method 100/101 (clipped direct to/in stud or under floorboards); final route to be coordinated with cable-containment skill.
Outdoor socket spur load ≤ 1.5 kW (lawnmower-equivalent); RCD 30mA primary protection per §411.3.3 covers additional protection per §522.6.202.

drawing_notes: All sockets BS 1363 double 13A switched unless noted; mount above_worktop = 150mm above finished worktop (typ. 1150mm AFFL); mount wall = 450mm AFFL per Part M.
Bathroom zone 3 SSU per BS EN 61558-2-5; no general-purpose sockets within 3m of zone 1 boundary.
Outdoor socket IP65 fed via 13A FCU from C01 ring; weatherproof enclosure on external wall, 1100mm AFFL.
Drawing per BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 layer naming (E-POW-OUTLET-G for ground-floor power, E-POW-OUTLET-1 for first-floor).

rationale.chat_summary: UK 3-bed dwelling, TN-C-S 230V single-phase. 2 ring final circuits per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.5 (kitchen-utility-dining-lounge ground-floor; 3 bedrooms first-floor) both within IET OSG §8.4.4 100 m² limit. 3 dedicated radials (cooker 32A, immersion 16A, bathroom shaver 6A). Bathroom Part 7-701 zone 3 with SSU only. Outdoor IP65 socket on C01 spur. All RCD Type A 30mA per §411.3.3. Ze=0.35Ω, PSCC=6kA declared; calc.zs_loop_impedance pending.

sections.title: Jurisdiction + Supply
sections.summary: GB jurisdiction, BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 18th Edition Amendment 2. TN-C-S single-phase 230V DNO supply with declared Ze=0.35Ω and PSCC=6kA at origin. Parent consumer unit CU-MAIN is a 12-way Amendment-3 board with 6kA Icu busbar.

decisions.label: TN-C-S supply confirmed
decisions.summary: DNO has provided combined neutral-earth at the cut-out; main earthing terminal bonded to incoming PEN per §411.4.2.

decisions.label: PSCC 6kA → all RCBOs ≥6kA Icu
decisions.summary: Declared 6kA at origin so every device on CU busbar must have ≥6kA breaking capacity per IEC 60898-1.
decisions.rule: OCPD breaking capacity ≥ prospective fault current

sections.title: Circuit Topology
sections.summary: Two 32A ring final circuits + three dedicated radials. Ground-floor ring (~52 m²) and first-floor ring (~36 m²) both within IET OSG §8.4.4 100 m² recommended footprint per 32A ring. Cooker, immersion and shaver each get a dedicated radial sized to their nameplate load.

decisions.label: Ring topology selected (GB jurisdiction)
decisions.summary: BS 7671 permits ring final circuits in GB; this is the dominant idiom for domestic 13A socket networks.

decisions.label: Cooker on dedicated 32A radial
decisions.summary: 7 kW hob+oven exceeds typical ring contribution under diversity; sized 6mm² T+E to a 45A CCU per IET OSG Table A1.
decisions.rule: IET OSG Appendix A cooker diversity (10A + 30% remainder + 5A for socket on CCU)
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide Appendix A, Table A1

sections.title: Special Locations
sections.summary: Bathroom is Part 7-701 location. Zones 0/1/2 receive no socket outlets; only a zone-3 BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver supply unit on C05. Outdoor garden socket is on external wall, IP65, fed by 13A FCU spur from C01 per §522.6.201.

decisions.label: Bathroom zone 3 SSU only
decisions.summary: BS 7671 prohibits general-purpose sockets within 3m of zone 1 boundary; shaver supply per BS EN 61558-2-5 is the only permitted socket.

decisions.label: Outdoor socket IP65 + 30mA RCD
decisions.summary: External wall socket installed in IP65 enclosure; 30mA RCD upstream provides §522.6.202 additional protection.
decisions.rule: External installations require IP-rated enclosure + 30mA RCD

sections.title: RCD Posture
sections.summary: All five circuits use Type A 30mA RCBOs per §411.3.3 additional protection for socket outlets ≤32A in domestic premises. No Type B requirement: no IT equipment producing smooth DC residual currents (EV charge points, PV inverters) on these circuits. No §411 exceptions documented.

decisions.label: Type A 30mA across all circuits
decisions.summary: Domestic dwelling with no DC-injecting loads; Type A handles pulsating DC from typical electronics and is the BS 7671 default.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 §411.3.3 additional protection for socket outlets ≤32A

sections.title: OCPD + Cable
sections.summary: Rings: 32A Type B RCBO + 2.5mm² Cu PVC ring with 1.5mm² CPC. Cooker: 32A RCBO + 6mm² T+E. Immersion: 16A RCBO + 2.5mm² T+E. Shaver: 6A RCBO + 1.5mm² T+E. All breakers Type B (no significant inrush). All RCBOs ≥6kA Icu to match parent PFC.

decisions.label: Ring cable 2.5mm² + 1.5mm² CPC
decisions.summary: BS 7671 Table 7.1 standard ring final circuit composition for 32A protection per §433.1.5.

decisions.label: Type B curve for all RCBOs
decisions.summary: Domestic loads have no significant inrush; Type B trip 3–5× In gives best fault protection and Zs margin.
decisions.rule: Curve selection per load profile (BS EN 60898-1)

sections.title: Diversity + Zs
sections.summary: Diversified loads estimated per IET OSG Appendix A (cooker 25A diversified from 30A nameplate; rings 16A and 6.5A under domestic profile). Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3: tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=true on every circuit and TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance in flags[].

decisions.label: Cooker diversified to 25A
decisions.summary: 30A nameplate → 10A + 30% × (30-10) + 5A (CCU socket) = 21A; rounded to 25A for design margin on 32A breaker.
decisions.rule: IET OSG Appendix A cooker diversity
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide Appendix A, Table A1

decisions.label: Zs deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance
decisions.summary: Loop impedance for ring (r1/rn/r2 + Ze + cable) is computed by calc skill; flagged with TOOL-CALL-PENDING.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Design is compliant (compliant=true). Three info-severity flags document the bathroom zone configuration (no sockets in zones 1/2), the outdoor spur arrangement, and the deferred Zs verification. Engineer assumes Ze=0.35Ω and PSCC=6kA declared at the consumer cut-out will be verified on energisation.

decisions.label: Ze and PSCC declared, not measured
decisions.summary: DNO declared values used for design; site verification at first energisation per §612.

sections.title: Drafting References
sections.summary: Single A1 sheet at 1:50 scale per BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 layer naming. Layers split by storey: E-POW-OUTLET-G (ground) and E-POW-OUTLET-1 (first). Bathroom zones annotated per Part 7-701 figures.

decisions.label: A1 @ 1:50 single-sheet output
decisions.summary: ~100 m² 2-storey dwelling fits one A1 sheet at 1:50 with both floor plans, panel schedule and notes.
